programmes.show_description: From brushing up on basic motorway etiquette, to extreme weather that'll make you wish you'd never left the house, we've got it all caught on camera. (S4, ep 3)
From animals taking over the roads, to arguments over parking, we've got it all caught on camera. (S4, ep 4)
New & Exclusive. Documentary series from New Zealand following the madness and mayhem faced by intrepid officers as they pull over motorists for a variety of suspected offences. (S20, ep 2)

A sloshed snowboarder causes trouble at the airport, before a pair of packages add up to a deadly surprise. (S1, ep 5)
A bad-tempered drill worker returning home from Japan goes one step too far with officers, while a Californian woman hides something in her child's stroller. (S1, ep 6)
Follow Australian Customs and Border Protection officers as they attempt to enforce the country's quarantine, customs, immigration and finance laws. (S16, ep 19)
Follow Australian Customs and Border Protection officers as they attempt to enforce the country's quarantine, customs, immigration and finance laws. (S16, ep 20)
In Sydney, Border Force officers are worried about a young girl who has met a man online, while a shipment of lollies is not what it seems. (S17, ep 1)
Biosecurity makes a gruesome discovery, officers interrogate a couple whose stories aren't stacking up and a couple are caught importing dangerous goods. (S17, ep 2)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S11, ep 1)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S11, ep 2)
Toronto airport officers discover a suspicious bag with a fake baggage tag. A box full of critters lands in the mail centre. (S3, ep 22)
Toronto officers intercept bags containing serious heat. Officers get to the bottom of an American's wads of cash. (S3, ep 23)
Reality series following the work of New Zealand's customs agents. (S15, ep 11)

The Nagus: Quark is suddenly named leader of the Ferengi financial empire and discovers that he is both popular and a target for death.
Forever In A Day: Daniel Jackson's reunion with Sha're leads to painful consequences. (S3, ep 10)
Unimatrix Zero - Part I: When Seven of Nine visits a virtual world where Borg drones temporarily regain autonomy, Janeway sees a chance to stir up trouble for the Borg.
Genesis: Picard and Data return to the Enterprise to discover that the entire crew has reverted to prehistoric beings.
Silurian Sands: A young girl chases her dog through an anomaly into a bleak landscape filled with burrowing monsters. Cutter and Stephen get trapped on the rescue mission. (S2, ep 5)
Torn: After finding a group of teens dead from a drug overdose, the team tries to find the dangerous dealer and his supplier. (S5, ep 21)
God Complex: When a doctor is found dead in a ritualistic slaying, the team must hunt down a religiously motivated serial killer. (S5, ep 22)
Fugitive: As Captain Renard issues a shoot-to-kill order, a desperate Nick goes into hiding. (S6, ep 1)
The Blood and the Sh*t: Ah Sahm and Young Jun transport precious cargo through Sierra Nevada. But trouble comes calling when an outlaw crashes their mission. (S1, ep 5)
Sharing shifts with Cambridgeshire's police force, this documentary reveals what life on the beat is really like. Contains strong language and some distressing scenes. (9/10)
Explosive documentary following Lincolnshire cops as they fight crime across one of the UK's largest counties. (S5, ep 2)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S9, ep 1)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S9, ep 2)

Near Dunedin, a driver claims to be sober despite having thrown up in his car. Also, a minivan ends up on its side and a biker gets schooled on the rules of the road. (S4, ep 9)
The final episode of the season comes with plenty of drama as a crash manages to knock out the power to all of Clyde. (S4, ep 10)

A Korean bride-to-be tries to enter Canada as a tourist, and the Marine Enforcement Team tackles a massive Japanese freighter carrying an illegal passenger. (S1, ep 7)
Officers suspect an IT consultant has arrived for more than just a holiday, and a surfer returns from Southeast Asia with a dodgy souvenir. (S1, ep 8)
A traveller has romance on his mind but may be hiding something from Border Force officers. A passenger arriving from Africa is caught with high-risk items. (S17, ep 3)
An Uber driver tries to smuggle prohibited goods, a suspicious shipment of football gear piques officers' interest and an unusual snack alarms officers. (S17, ep 4)
At Sydney Airport, a routine inspection takes an extreme turn. Plus, Officers are suspicious of a woman with a 'borrowed' suitcase. (S17, ep 5)
An unhappy passenger causes trouble for Border Force in Perth. Meanwhile, officers uncover a million-dollar smuggling attempt in a shipping container. (S17, ep 6)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S11, ep 3)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S11, ep 4)
Officers suspect a Canadian gambler is holding out on details of his cross-border trip.  A traveller's concealment method is deemed fowl play. (S3, ep 24)
At the baggage hall in Vancouver, CBSA detector dogs are on the hunt. In Montreal, a returning bride may have broken her declaration vows. (S3, ep 25)

Vortex: Odo travels through the stable wormhole into the Gamma Quadrant in search of his people, but the Changelings are not exactly the way he expects.
Past And Present: SG-1 encounters an entire world suffering from amnesia. (S3, ep 11)
Unimatrix Zero: Although captured, Captain Janeway confronts the Borg Queen after infecting the Central Plexus with the Doctor's pathogen and demands the cure. (S7, ep 1)
Journey's End: While Picard is forced to relocate a group of American Indians from a planet where they have settled, one of the colonists causes Wesley to re-examine his future.
Traitor Revealed: As the rest of the team capture a mammoth wreaking havoc on the motorway, Stephen allies himself with Helen. The traitor is finally revealed. (S2, ep 6)
No Good Deed: After a difficult rescue doesn't go to plan and a life is lost, an internal investigation is opened. (S1, ep 9)
On These Waters: After a frenzied attack by gunmen aboard a river cruise ship on the Danube, the Fly Team heads to Vienna to investigate. (S1, ep 18)
Trust Me Knot: With Nick still on the run from Renard's manhunt, Hank and Wu make a discovery that could change everything. (S6, ep 2)
